name: 8-Day Tour: Casablanca → Chefchaouen → Fes → Sahara → Marrakech

seo.title: 8-Day Casablanca to Marrakech Tour — Chefchaouen, Fes, Sahara | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 8-day tour from Casablanca: Hassan II Mosque, Chefchaouen, Volubilis, Fes (guide), Merzouga (Sahara), Todra, Dades, Ait Ben Haddou, Marrakech (guide).

hero.tagline: Casablanca → Chefchaouen → Fes → Sahara → Marrakech in 8 days

intro: This 8-day tour is the grand tour of Morocco from Casablanca: Hassan II Mosque, Chefchaouen, Volubilis, Fes with an official guide, the Merzouga desert, the Todra Gorges, the Dades Valley, Ait Ben Haddou, and Marrakech with an official guide. Two certified local guides included.
